rationale: Educ. Code §22.902 governs CPR and AED instruction in schools; it has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 22.902. INSTRUCTION RELATED TO CARDIOPULMONARY RESUSCITATION AND USE OF AUTOMATED EXTERNAL DEFIBRILLATOR.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no interaction detected.
